kicker.description: Small uppercase label that sits ABOVE the main heading. Keep it short — 1 to 3 words. Examples: 'For founders', 'A note from Anna', 'New series'.

intro_v2.description: One short paragraph that sits under the main heading. 2-3 sentences max. Select text and click the link icon to add a hyperlink — a popup will ask you for the URL.

circle_description_v2.description: Description of The Returning Circle. Select text and click the link icon to add a hyperlink — a popup will ask you for the URL.

reset_room_description_v2.description: Description of The Reset Room. Select text and click the link icon to add a hyperlink — a popup will ask you for the URL.

seo_title.description: Optional SEO title override (60 chars max). Leave blank to use the page/item name. Shown in Google search results and browser tabs.

seo_description.description: Short summary for Google and ChatGPT (1-2 sentences, ~155 chars). Write what someone searching for this would actually type. Fills in automatically when you Save — leave blank unless you want to override

upsells.description: Up to 3 'next step' cards shown at the bottom of this page. Each card has an image + label + short blurb + link. Leave empty to hide the upsell block entirely. Example use: on the About page, point to the Reset Room and Reset Letters.
